CONTENT.Club career: Bergström joined English Premier League side Chelsea from his native side TPS in 2018. He made his youth debut in the final game of 2018–19 season against Reading and turned professional in September 2019. On 14 September 2021, Bergström was named among substitutes for the Champions League group match against Zenit Saint Petersburg at home. In 2023, Bergström travelled to the USA as part of the Premier League Summer Series. At the start of the 2023-24 Premier league season, Marcus Bettinelli and Robert Sánchez had received injures allowing Bergström to be named on the bench on multiple occasions.In July 2022, Bergström was sent on loan to Peterborough United in the League One. On 30 July, He made his professional debut in a 3–2 win in a League One match against Cheltenham Town. Bergström managed 9 clean sheets in 28 matches in all competitions.On 29 February 2024, Bergström extended his contract with Chelsea, and immediately thereafter Brommapojkarna announced that Bergström would join the team for the duration of the 2024 Allsvenskan season. However, the loan was terminated on 18 June.
CONTENT.External links: Chelsea F.C. official profileFinnish Football Federation profileLucas Bergström at BDFutbol
CONTENT.International career: Bergström has represented Finland at under-16 and under-17 levels. He was called up to under-21 squad between 2021 and 2022 ahead of 2023 UEFA European Under-21 Championship qualification.On 9 January 2023, Bergström made his debut in the Finland national football team starting in a friendly against Sweden, where Sweden won the match 2-0.

SUMMARY: Lucas Carl Edvard Bergström (born 5 September 2002) is a Finnish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club  Chelsea.
